MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2020 Vacated

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jennifer Myers, Esq. of REESE LAW GROUP, T:760.842.5850, for plaintiff/ moving party, on Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Granted. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order and proposed judgment submitted with the moving papers.
